summary: Created comprehensive deal classification rules document covering: (1) Deal type definitions (careerspan_acquirer, zo_partnership, leadership), (2) Classification decision tree, (3) Four core rules with anti-patterns, (4) Concrete examples including Calendly scenario, (5) Broker linkage protocol with step-by-step process, (6) Notion-to-local table mapping reference. Document is actionable and addresses the specific issues from V's review (Calendly misclassification, Ivor/Vir→Handshake linkage gaps).
